chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1298 of 2024 C.P. No.D-1816 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.03.2025 M/s. Maisum Hussain Sahar and Asif Ali Arain advocates for petitioner(s). Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani advocate for respondent No.7 in C.P. No.D-1298 of 2024. Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Shahida Ghani Special Prosecutor NAB along with Aisar Ali I.O. NAB. Learned A.A.G. Sindh files comments, provides copy to the other side where learned counsel for the petitioner requires time to go through the same and if requires would file counter affidavit thereto. Learned counsel for respondent No.6 in C.P. No.D-1816 of 2024 files a statement wherein it is contended that the respondent has acquired age of superannuation and, as such, learned counsel states that the said Quo Warranto petition has become infructuous. Learned counsel for the petitioner in the said petition does not oppose for the same. Accordingly, C.P. No.D-1816 of 2024 is disposed of as having become infructuous; however, the file thereof, to come up along with C.P. No.D-1298 of 2024 on 26.03.2025. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
